input.background: Twenty-six cancer deaths were observed in a cohort of 556 insulation workers. Based on national statistics, a cohort of this size and age distribution was expected to experience 14.4 incident cases during the observation period. Therefore, under the null hypothesis, $p_0=14.4 / 556=0.02590$. Test whether the observed incidence is significantly greater than expected.
input.question: State the null and alternative hypotheses.
